reviews.review_msg: Thought I was gonna die, but surprisingly did okay from half a day of studying for the final. All mc for mt and final, but must read textbook and skim lec slides. Lectures are useless unless you're interested in his life experiences.

Extremely experienced in the real world and extremely successful. His stories give you a very unique perspective on marketing and business, as it is things that academic profs would never say. Very very interesting stories.
Expect to read 730 pages (ch.1-22) for the final exam. useless lecture, but forced to go. although no one fails in his class, but u'll suffer. trust me...sigh

Good Prof. Talks a lot about life experiences (which he has tons of). Read the book!!!! He got pissed off one time because most of the class didn't. Participate, read the book, and  go to class...that will get you a good grade with Ashok

If you are interested and participate a lot he will help you succeed in this class. He loves to tell interesting stories and you can learn a lot from him. He is super nice, but expects a lot out of his students
Very Good Prof.  Experienced and gives Fantastic insights in the subject.
Learn a lot about people skills in international business.  Demonstrates favoritism.  Can't mark because everyone gets around the same grade: low,avg,high is within about 2.5 marks.
Bad time management, lectures always run overtime and yet he doesn't like people who are late to his class. Rather easy midterm and final, lectures are useless, just read and memorize the textbook.

Imagine paying $600 for the textbook, and we have this class. Worthless lectures, as he spends half of the time reading the publisher's notes, and the other half telling crazy anecdotes about how he used to run a pudding factory in Finland, etc.
Easy Midterm but somewhat complicated final, the lecture is way useless, strict assignment marking standard from TA. Irrelevant lecture, just read the terms on the book and you will pass easily.

Not a good teacher, uses slides provided by the text book, talks too long off topic and wastes time canvassing class for pointless answers.  After realizing he's running out of time, he'll rush through the last few slides.  Always runs over class time.  Terrible time management.  Lectures useless.
